title: Exertional chest pressure relieved by rest
patientBrief: Chest pressure during walking uphill that improves with rest.
openingComplaint: I keep getting a tight feeling in my chest when I walk fast or climb stairs.
authorNote: This is stable angina. Sound concerned but calm. Mention relief with rest when asked about timing or triggers.

symptoms: goes away after a few minutes of rest
mild shortness of breath during episodes
history: smokes about one pack a day
